pi_items.source: Cross-referenced setup_task.sh (line 55, 58-60), export_result.sh (lines 27-33), and task description. Confirmed as valid Nuxeo path format matching domain/workspace_type/workspace_name convention.

Consistent across: task.json metadata (line 19), verifier.py (line 25), task description, and setup_task.sh original title (line 58: 'Annual Report 2023'). Document type is File, path component is Annual-Report-2023.

Consistent across: task.json metadata (line 20), verifier.py (line 26), task description, and setup_task.sh original title (line 59: 'Project Proposal'). Document type is File, path component is Project-Proposal.

Consistent across: task.json metadata (line 21), verifier.py (line 27), task description, and setup_task.sh original title (line 60: 'Q3 Status Report'). Document type is Note, path component is Q3-Status-Report.

privileged_info_summary: The task targets a Nuxeo Platform workspace at path /default-domain/workspaces/Projects containing exactly three documents: Annual-Report-2023 (File type, original title 'Annual Report 2023'), Project-Proposal (File type, original title 'Project Proposal'), and Q3-Status-Report (Note type, original title 'Q3 Status Report'). All documents are created dynamically by the setup_task.sh script via Nuxeo REST API calls. The expected renamed titles are: 'PROJ-2023-Annual Report 2023', 'PROJ-2023-Project Proposal', and 'PROJ-2023-Q3 Status Report', with the common prefix 'PROJ-2023-' applied to each original title.
